name: SwingBros Indoor Golf Simulator
about: SwingBros Indoor Golf Simulator is a mobile golf simulator service based in Rochester, NY, providing virtual golf experiences at client locations. The service is powered by Trackman 4 technology and caters to a range of events including corporate gatherings, bachelor parties, and community festivals. Their offering brings a high-tech, on-site golf simulator to various venues such as offices, parking lots, backyards, and event spaces, accommodating all skill levels without requiring travel to a dedicated facility.
why_golfers_like_it: Convenient mobile service brings the golf simulator to any location
Premium Trackman 4 technology provides accurate and realistic ball flight data
Caters to all skill levels from seasoned pros to first-time players
Versatile for various event types without the need for travel

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; appears to be a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) event model.
No alcohol service mentioned; appears to be a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) event model.

simulator_hardware.notes: The primary launch monitor and simulator hardware, specified as Trackman 4 technology.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The service description does not explicitly mention whether clubs are provided. It's recommended to contact SwingBros directly to confirm if clubs are included or if clients should bring their own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) model. No in-house food or alcohol service is mentioned, so clients are expected to provide their own refreshments for their event.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole game take?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify a duration for an 18-hole simulation. Standard simulator rounds typically take 2-3 hours, but the exact time may depend on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the golf simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The content does not explicitly state whether the service is kid-friendly or has specific accommodations for children. While it mentions catering to 'all skill levels,' it's best to inquire directly about family-friendly options and age appropriateness.
